meaning: vt.斩首,砍头,[地质](指海盗河pirale stream)使其他河川的水流入自己河中
examples: Take him out and behead him!
Their goal was to kill scores of people, with specific plans to behead 14 of them.
It is not uncommon to cut hands for stealing and behead someone for more heinous crimes.
But the answer is not the Charles Ferguson impulse to restrict VCs. (He'd rather behead a few to thin the ranks.) Rather, it is to open up the doors to the world.
